bills.title: CLARITY Act (digital asset market structure)
bills.nexus: Directs SEC/CFTC/Treasury joint rulemaking; illicit-finance and special-measures provisions.

bills.title: CFPB rule disapprovals (multiple)
bills.nexus: Resolutions of disapproval affecting bureau rules within committee jurisdiction.

cra.note: 60 calendar days from publication. Statutory clock runs on legislative/session days; confirm against chamber calendars.

cra.title: Publication of Venezuela Sanctions Regulations Web General Licenses 48A and 49A
cra.abstract: The Department of the Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) is publishing two general licenses (GLs) issued pursuant to the Venezuela Sanctions Regulations: GLs 48A and 49A, which were previously made available on OFAC's website.

cra.note: 60 calendar days from publication. Statutory clock runs on legislative/session days; confirm against chamber calendars.
